message:
feat: Implement complex TODO stubs with real functionality

- _iomodule.zig: Full _io_open implementation with mode parsing,
  FileIO creation, BufferedReader/Writer wrapping, TextIOWrapper
- sqlite3.zig: create_function with sqlite3_create_function_v2,
  supports C-compatible function pointers
- exception_types.zig: PyErr_NewException_ValueError creates
  PyUnicode message and tuple args

Reduces TODO count from 15 to 12 (3 complex implementations).
